target.title: docs: add config unset dry-run documentation
target.body:
## Summary

Add documentation for `config unset` command including:
- Basic usage examples
- `--dry-run` option for validation without writing
- `--dry-run --json` for structured output
- `--allow-exec` for exec SecretRef resolvability checks
- SecretRef fallout detection
- Exec SecretRef handling

## Note

This is a refresh of PR #82723 which was closed due to excessive merge conflicts after falling behind main. The documentation content is unchanged.

Original PR: #82723

## Test plan

- [x] Docs build passes: `pnpm docs:build`
target.author: enjouzeratul
